name: godot-superpowers
description: Single-plugin marketplace for godot-superpowers — full-spectrum Godot 4.x game development plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: godot-superpowers
plugins.description: 22 skills, 11 subagents, hooks (gdformat / gdlint / .tscn validation), MCP integration. Covers scaffolding, components, state machines, save systems, GUT tests, shaders, audio, export pipelines, and genre packs (platformer, top-down, 3D action, turn-based).
